api_payload.title: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stack-based overflow

detection_pack.sigma:
title: APEX - CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac — Generic Cve
id: apex-generic-4ba5f2d1
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects exploitation activity for CVE-2026-9459 (GENERIC_CVE). Review the specific vulnerability class and affected product to tune this rule for your environment.
  Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9459
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/05/25
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1190
    - attack.t1190
    - attack.t1059
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  unexpected_outbound:
    Initiated: 'true'
    DestinationPort:
      - 4444
      - 1337
      - 31337
      - 8888
      - 9001
      - 9999
  ioc_network_indicators:
    DestinationHostname|contains:
      - 'https://cvefeed.io/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9459'
  condition: unexpected_outboundor ioc_network_indicators
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate applications using non-standard ports
  - Development and testing environments
level: medium
detection_pack.spl:
| comment "CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac | CVE-2026-9459 | APEX v161.0"

index=network OR index=proxy earliest=-24h
| eval threat_match = if(match(_raw, "(?i)(https://cvefeed\.io/vuln/detail/CVE\-2026\-9459)"), 1, 0)
| where threat_match=1
| eval rule="APEX-CVE-2026-9459", severity="HIGH"
| stats count min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_host, rule, severity
| convert timeformat="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen)
| sort -count
detection_pack.yara:
rule APEX_CVE_2026_9459__GENERIC_CVE {
    meta:
        description   = "APEX detection: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stack-based ov"
        cve           = "CVE-2026-9459"
        vuln_class    = "GENERIC_CVE"
        author        = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0"
        date          = "2026-05-25"
        reference     = "https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com"
        severity      = "high"
        mitre_attack  = "T1190, T1059"
    strings:
        $ioc_0 = "https://cvefeed.io/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9459" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: https://cvefeed.io/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-
    condition:
        any of ($ioc_*)
}
detection_pack.elastic_lucene:
// Elastic Lucene: intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6
("<indicator>") AND @timestamp:[now-30d TO now]
detection_pack.qradar_aql:
/* QRadar AQL: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac | intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6 */
SELECT DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
  sourceip, destinationip, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS Source,
  QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName, 'intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6' AS AdvisoryID
FROM flows
WHERE (TEXT SEARCH '<indicator>')
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 2592000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC LIMIT 10000
START '30 days ago' STOP 'now'
detection_pack.chronicle_yaral:
// Chronicle YARA-L: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac
rule apex_intel__ff51162f3a8787497d6030f {
  meta:
    description = "CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stack-based overflow"
    author = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX"
    severity = "MEDIUM"
    attack_techniques = "TT1190 | TT1190 | TT1059"
  events:
  $e.metadata.event_type = "NETWORK_CONNECTION"
  condition:
    $e
}
detection_pack.crowdstrike:
// CrowdStrike NG-SIEM: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 10000
| search (CommandHistory contains "<indicator>")
| eval hunt_id="intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6"
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine
detection_pack.sentinelone:
// SentinelOne Power Query: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac
EventType = 'Process Creation' AND
(ProcessCmd Contains "<indicator>")
| columns SrcProcName, SrcProcCmdLine, AgentComputerName, SrcProcUser
detection_pack.falco:
- rule: APEX - CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac
  desc: intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6 - TT1190 | TT1190 | TT1059
  condition: spawned_process and (proc.cmdline contains "<indicator>")
  output: "APEX Alert: %proc.name %proc.cmdline"
  priority: MEDIUM
  tags: [apex, TT1190, TT1190, TT1059]
detection_pack.osquery:
-- OSQuery: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac | intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6
SELECT pid, name, cmdline, path, parent, uid
FROM processes
WHERE (cmdline LIKE '%indicator%');

retro_hunt.spl_splunk:
| comment "RETRO-HUNT: intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6 | CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac | Techniques: T1190 T1059"
index=* earliest=-90d latest=now
(
    ("<ip_indicator>")
    OR ("<domain_indicator>")
    OR ("<hash_indicator>")
)
| eval hunt_advisory="intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6"
| eval hunt_techniques="T1190 T1059"
| eval hunt_ts=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval indicator_type=case(
    match(_raw, "(x.x.x.x"), "IP",
    match(_raw, "(domain"), "Domain",
    match(_raw, "(hash"), "Hash",
    1==1, "Unknown"
  )
| stats count AS hits,
    min(_time) AS first_seen,
    max(_time) AS last_seen,
    dc(host) AS affected_hosts,
    values(sourcetype) AS sources
    BY hunt_advisory, indicator_type, host
| where hits > 0
| eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
       last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| sort - hits
retro_hunt.qradar_aql:
/* RETRO-HUNT AQL: intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6 | Lookback: 90d */
SELECT
    DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
    sourceip, destinationip, destinationhostname,
    username, "Application", "Event Category",
    LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS LogSource,
    QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName,
    'intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6' AS HuntAdvisoryID
FROM events
WHERE (
    destinationip IN ('<ip>')
    OR sourceip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destinationhostname IN ('<domain>')
    OR LOOKUPHOSTNAME(destinationip) IN ('<domain>')
)
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 7776000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC
LIMIT 10000
START '90d ago'
STOP 'now'
retro_hunt.crowdstrike_eql:
/* RETRO-HUNT CrowdStrike Event Query: intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6 | Techniques: T1190, T1059 */
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 1000
| eval hunt_id="intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6"
| search (sha256 = "<hash>") OR (DomainName = "<domain>")
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine, UserSid, TimeStamp
| sort count desc
retro_hunt.generic_sql:
/* RETRO-HUNT Generic SQL: intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6 | Lookback: 90d */
/* Compatible with: Splunk Data Lake, Snowflake, BigQuery, Azure Data Explorer */
SELECT
    event_timestamp,
    host_name,
    source_ip,
    destination_ip,
    destination_domain,
    file_hash_sha256,
    process_name,
    process_command_line,
    user_name,
    'intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6' AS hunt_advisory_id
FROM security_events
WHERE event_timestamp > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND (
    destination_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR source_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destination_domain IN ('<domain>')
    OR file_hash_sha256 IN ('<hash>')
  )
ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50000;

normalized_rules.kql:
// Sentinel Rule: CVE-2026-9459 - Edimax EW-7438RPn formConnectionSetting stac | intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6 | Techniques: TT1190 | TT1190 | TT1059
// Severity: medium
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("<indicator>")
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessCommandLine
| extend AdvisoryID="intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6", Techniques="TT1190 | TT1190 | TT1059"

("<indicator>")
| eval hunt_id="intel--ff51162f3a8787497d6030f6" | eval severity="medium"
| stats count AS hits, min(_time) AS first, max(_time) AS last,
    dc(host) AS hosts BY CommandLine, host, sourcetype
| where hits > 0 | sort - hits
